descriptionHtml:
Hanse 458 for sale 2020 | 4 Cabins Version | Tax Not Paid

If you are searching for a proven and comfortable cruiser, the Hanse 458 for sale 2020 presents a well maintained option. This yacht is thoughtfully designed to offer both style and practicality, with modern lines and features suited to enjoyable coastal and offshore sailing (Autopilot, Compass, Solar Panels, Winches, Bilge pumps, Bow thruster, Tender...). Currently available for sale, she is in good condition, maintained to be ready for her next adventures.

Key Specifications

  • Flag of registry: Greece
  • Length overall: 13.55 m
  • Beam: 4.38 m
  • Draught: 2.23 m
  • Cruising speed: 8 knots
  • Maximum speed: 10 knots
  • Fuel tank capacity: 210 litres
  • Fresh water tank capacity: 450 litres

Accommodation

  • Cabins: 4
  • Heads: 2
  • Interior finish: Wood Canadian chestnut

Equipment and Features

  • Galley: Oven, refrigerator, deep freezer
  • Heads: Electric head
  • Water: Hot water system

Deck & Exterior

  • Outboard engine brackets and tender
  • Teak on cockpit bottom
  • Lewmar 45 ST EVO winches (x2)
  • Bimini top, genoa cover, sprayhood
  • Bow thruster

Navigation & Electronics

The Hanse 458 for sale 2020 comes with a full B&G Navigation Package for safe and efficient passage-making:

  • Depth sounder
  • Log speedometer
  • Wind indicator
  • Repeater
  • Navigation area
  • Chartplotter
  • Autopilot
  • Compass
  • GPS
  • VHF radio
  • 2 x B&G Zeus 3 9'' multifunction displays

Technical & Comfort Systems

  • Bilge pumps: Electric and manual
  • Inmast furling system
  • Victron Inverter 3000W 12/220V
  • Flex solar panel 240W

Summary

The Hanse 458 for sale 2020 stands out for those seeking a reliable cruiser with versatile accommodation and sensible equipment, well-suited for comfortable sailing in a variety of conditions. If interested, for more information or to schedule a viewing don't hesitate to contact us!
